title: rubus friesiorum
intro: Rubus friesiorum, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus friesiorum include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rubus friesiorum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
